failure_story: We treated BMNR as a discounted ETH wrapper trading below May 2026 token fair value per share, but the equity became a perpetual ATM financing vehicle. Aggressive share issuance diluted ETH per share faster than ETH appreciated, while nine-month G&A of $335.7 million and $287.6 million of operating cash burn consumed staking yield and treasury liquidity. Unmodeled BMNP preferred and warrant senior claims further reduced common look-through. ETH rose in aggregate but per-share economics deteriorated; the stock severely underperformed direct ETH and never closed the mNAV gap.
earliest_warning_signals: Common shares outstanding rose to 579.7 million from 232.4 million year over year while the market kept pricing a structural mNAV discount near 0.84x ETH fair value.
Nine-month cash used in operating activities was $287.6 million and G&A was $335.7 million, far above $56.9 million of staking revenue, signaling corporate burn before any ETH beta.
Base Lawrence IRR was 6.3% per year at $15.69, already below the ~15% accumulate hurdle, implying insufficient compensation for unbounded dilution risk at entry.
ETH per diluted share trajectory was modeled with only 10% cumulative ATM dilution over seven years despite filings documenting repeated ATM and private placements during the treasury pivot.
Preferred stock (BMNP), warrant, and deferred tax claims on treasury economics were flagged [HUMAN REVIEW] but left at zero in the base payoff build.
forensic_checks: Reconcile quarterly ETH units held divided by fully diluted common shares against ETH spot and filing fair-value marks; flag any quarter where dilution exceeds token accumulation.
Trace proceeds from every ATM, private placement, and warrant exercise to ETH purchases versus G&A, advisory fees, and operating burn.
Build a BMNP preferred and warrant conversion waterfall showing common look-through after senior claims, deferred tax liability ($92.3M at May 31, 2026), and strategic advisor warrants.
Net staking and validation revenue against custody, protocol, and corporate costs to test whether operating cash ever covers G&A drag.
Audit custody, validator, and counterparty exposures against 10-K risk factors for impairment or slashing events.
Verify the SOTP build does not double-count static ETH look-through (~$18.76/sh) with the seven-year trajectory net-of-dilution uplift (+$4.5/sh).
Run Tier-1 short activist registry and forensic short web scan; adversarial pass cited no_hit on short_scan_2026-05-28.md only.
unresolved_items: BMNP preferred stock claims and post-May 31, 2026 ATM issuance are not fully modeled in static look-through or the senior-claim reserve.
No preferred and warrant waterfall converts filing-level treasury fair value into per-common-share realizability.
Management alignment, strategic advisor warrant economics, and Tom Lee chairman incentives remain insufficiently tested (management_facts document_count is zero).
Live ETH spot versus May 31, 2026 fair value marks was flagged [HUMAN REVIEW] but not confirmed before sizing.
Tier-1 forensic short scan was batch no_hit only; no local short_reports/ and no targeted activist diligence on a levered crypto treasury name.
